mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_bed WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} ORDER BY bed_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_bed (dormitory_id, bed_no, status, student_id) VALUES (#{dormitoryId}, #{bedNo}, #{status}, #{studentId})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_bed SET status = #{status}, student_id = #{studentId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, d.id as dorm_id, d.building_no, d.floor_no, d.room_no, d.dorm_type, d.bed_total, d.bed_available, d.status as dorm_status FROM t_bed b LEFT JOIN t_dormitory d ON b.dormitory_id = d.id WHERE b.student_id = #{studentId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_bed WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND status = #{status}
